## CustomTypeRegistration.tsTypeNames property

Optional TypeScript surface names that should resolve to this custom type during TSDoc/class analysis. Defaults to `typeName` when omitted.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly tsTypeNames?: readonly string[];
```
